overview.short: Someshwara Temple is a Hindu temple in Marathahalli, Bangalore, Karnataka, India, dedicated to Siva.

topPlaces.name: Kodibeesanahalli metro station
topPlaces.description: Kodibeesanahalli is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. Around this metro station holds the IT Companies like JP Morgan Chase,Adobe, Nutanix Technologies Pvt.

topPlaces.name: Marathahalli
topPlaces.description: Marathahalli is a major eastern suburb of the city of Bengaluru, Karnataka. It is infamous for its traffic and is a cheaper choice for IT employees to live in because of its close proximity to the IT clusters in Mahadevapura, Bellandur, International Tech Park, and Whitefield.It is famous for having a huge Telugu population in the city and is known as the little Andhra of the city which led to many businesses being established in the local area catering specifically to their tastes.

topPlaces.name: Marathahalli metro station
topPlaces.description: Marathahalli is an important upcoming elevated metro station on the north–south corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves mainly the Marathahalli suburban area and als WeWork, a coworking space company in South Bengaluru and the main Marathahalli Bridge that connects Kundalahalli area and HAL Aerospace Museum along with the Outer Ring Road which leads towards Hebbal in the north and Silk Board in the south.

topPlaces.name: ISRO metro station
topPlaces.description: ISRO is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro serves mainly the Doddanekundi area, which comprises the ISRO Assembly Integration & Testing Centre in South Bengaluru and the Outer Ring Road, which leads towards Krishnarajapura in the north and Bellandur in the south.

topPlaces.name: Kadubeesanahalli metro station
topPlaces.description: Embassy TechVillage Kadubeesanahalli (formerly known as Kadubeesanahalli) is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves mainly Embassy TechnoVillage, which comprises IT companies such J.P. Morgan Chase, Cisco, Wells Fargo, New Horizon College of Engineering and Carmatec .

topPlaces.name: Vibhutipura Lake
topPlaces.description: Vibuthipura Lake is a lake in the suburb of Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, in the southeast of the city of Bengaluru. The lake is the part of Bellandur-Varthur Lake series.

topPlaces.name: Doddanekundi metro station
topPlaces.description: Doddanekundi is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves IT companies such as Amazon Web Services, Lenovo India, and Qualcomm, in addition to Bagmane Constellation Business Park, Rainbow Children's Hospital and DJ Sports Complex in South Bengaluru.

topPlaces.name: 2024 Bengaluru cafe bombing
topPlaces.description: On 1 March 2024, two terrorists belonging to ISIS, Mussavir Hussain Shazib and Abdul Mateen Taha, planted an improvised explosive device (IED) inside a bag at the Rameshwaram Cafe in Bengaluru, India. The bomb detonated and at least eight people were injured and taken to hospital, though none were in critical condition.

items.note: Kodibeesanahalli is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. Around this metro station holds the IT Companies like JP Morgan Chase,Adobe, Nutanix Technologies Pvt.

Marathahalli is a major eastern suburb of the city of Bengaluru, Karnataka. It is infamous for its traffic and is a cheaper choice for IT employees to live in because of its close proximity to the IT clusters in Mahadevapura, Bellandur, International Tech Park, and Whitefield.It is famous for having a huge Telugu population in the city and is known as the little Andhra of the city which led to many businesses being established in the local area catering specifically to their tastes.

Marathahalli is an important upcoming elevated metro station on the north–south corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves mainly the Marathahalli suburban area and als WeWork, a coworking space company in South Bengaluru and the main Marathahalli Bridge that connects Kundalahalli area and HAL Aerospace Museum along with the Outer Ring Road which leads towards Hebbal in the north and Silk Board in the south.

ISRO is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro serves mainly the Doddanekundi area, which comprises the ISRO Assembly Integration & Testing Centre in South Bengaluru and the Outer Ring Road, which leads towards Krishnarajapura in the north and Bellandur in the south.

Embassy TechVillage Kadubeesanahalli (formerly known as Kadubeesanahalli) is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves mainly Embassy TechnoVillage, which comprises IT companies such J.P. Morgan Chase, Cisco, Wells Fargo, New Horizon College of Engineering and Carmatec .
Vibuthipura Lake is a lake in the suburb of Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, in the southeast of the city of Bengaluru. The lake is the part of Bellandur-Varthur Lake series.

Doddanekundi is an upcoming elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Blue Line of Namma Metro in Bangalore, India. This metro station serves IT companies such as Amazon Web Services, Lenovo India, and Qualcomm, in addition to Bagmane Constellation Business Park, Rainbow Children's Hospital and DJ Sports Complex in South Bengaluru.

On 1 March 2024, two terrorists belonging to ISIS, Mussavir Hussain Shazib and Abdul Mateen Taha, planted an improvised explosive device (IED) inside a bag at the Rameshwaram Cafe in Bengaluru, India. The bomb detonated and at least eight people were injured and taken to hospital, though none were in critical condition.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (27 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (13 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli?
faq.a: Stays in Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Someshwara Temple, Marathahalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodibeesanahalli metro station, Marathahalli, Marathahalli metro station, ISRO metro station, Kadubeesanahalli metro station.
